reading.title: Reading: A busy afternoon
reading.passage: First, I finished my homework. After that, I called my friend. Then we came together at the park, and finally we had dinner together. We moved to this city ten years ago, and at that time, there weren't many tall buildings.

questions.question: The writer called a friend before finishing homework.
questions.explanation: "First, I finished my homework. After that, I called my friend."

questions.question: There were many tall buildings when the family moved.

reading.title: Reading: Review — A memorable trip
reading.passage: Two years ago, I visited Hue with my classmates. First, we explored the old citadel. Then we took a lot of photos. We didn't have a map at first, so we got lost. Finally, a kind local helped us, and everything was fine.

questions.question: They had a map at first.
questions.explanation: "We didn't have a map at first".

questions.question: Who helped them when they got lost?
